**Subject:** Your subscription will be deactivated soon

**From:** Atlassian Loom <noreply@po.atlassian.net>

**Message:**
Atlassian
[https://commerce-cdn.prod.atl-paas.net/logos/id-summit/id-summit-email_logo_360x80_NEW.png]http://www.atlassian.com


YOUR SUBSCRIPTION WILL BE DEACTIVATED SOON



tasks
[https://commerce-cdn.prod.atl-paas.net/illustration-library/Finishing-Tasks.png]

Hi Zeenat,

It’s OK, we all get busy! You still have time to add payment details before your
subscription is deactivated.

 * Loom, Monthly, Business + AI (USD, Default, 23-10-2024) (E-44C-726-4TE-W6Y) |
   zinatyamin.atlassian.net

Your total estimated bill is USD 24.00 (excludes tax)

Add payment details
[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/3a721630-3b10-4137-a853-eb6f95a32a01?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..9ocmTIre2hEDknO3whrKac8baqUBuR90RJejJPMOTaQ&j=1]

Once you add payment details, we’ll process payment from the start of your
billing cycle.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Please contact us
[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/4581a31e-9da8-4110-b6f2-4c63906c68f0?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..9ocmTIre2hEDknO3whrKac8baqUBuR90RJejJPMOTaQ&j=1]
with any questions, we're always happy to help.

Thanks,
The Atlassian team
